strategy: Darkmoor team fight (25000). He swaps forms: wolf form is Fire (hit him with Ice, +30%; he resists Fire 64%), human form is Ice (hit with Fire; he resists Ice 76%). Match your hitter's school to his current form.
Fire Dispels prevent his big protected Damage-over-Time cheats (17775 over 60 rounds) at round 1 and when he polymorphs. Bring them, and heal the team if a DoT lands.
Go easy on positive charms: every round a wizard casts one, his polymorph and Incindiate cheats trigger a round earlier. Blade minimally, right before the hit.
Traps: the first negative ward on him is fine, but the second removes ALL traps from him and his minion. Keep to a single trap at a time and re-trap only after his minion signals it is safe.
His minion buffs, heals, and shields the enemy side and revives once. Clear or out-pace it, and remember the dungeon clue NPCs grant your team helpful auras if chosen correctly.
Funnel blades to the hitter and burst him within a single form, healing through the DoTs.
cheatNotes: The first trap on him or his minion is allowed, so placing one is fine.
The second trap triggers removal of ALL traps from him and his minion. Never stack more than one trap at a time.
His minion says a line to signal it is safe to trap again after you have hit. Wait for it before re-trapping.
Round 1 he lays a protected DoT dealing 17775 over 60 rounds. A Fire Dispel beforehand prevents it; keep the team healed if it lands.
At the end of round 3 he becomes human (Ice school) and stacks another 17775/60 DoT. Switch your hitter to Fire and Dispel if you can.
Fire Dispels stop these DoT cheats. Carry a couple for the team.
Each positive charm a wizard casts pulls his next form or DoT cheat one round earlier. Minimize blades and cast them just before hitting.
In human form he is Ice: hit him with Fire; he now resists Ice 76% and boosts 30% Fire.
At the end of round 7 he reverts to wolf and casts a Sun Incindiate. Have the team's incoming-damage buffs or heals ready.
Every round with a positive charm keeps pulling the Incindiate and form cheats earlier. Keep charm use lean.
His minion acts every other round from round 1 with one of the support cheats below. Account for enemy buffs and heals.
The minion can Bladestorm the enemy side with two +30% charms, so his hits ramp. Re-Feint and keep healing.
The minion can Mass Tower Shield the enemy side. Over-stack blades or pierce through it.
The minion can Pigsie-heal his allies with heal-over-times. Burst the boss faster than the minion heals.
The minion revives once at full HP then leaves at end of turn. Do not over-invest in killing it.
The dungeon hides three clues; finding one clears an NPC as innocent. Correct choices unlock the helpful cheats below.
Choosing correctly can grant your team a 6-round Quicken at the end of round 1, a big tempo boost.
You may also get a Guardian Spirit that restores 100% HP to all wizards. Rely on it only if your choices were right.
Before his Incindiate you may get a Fortify cutting incoming damage -135%, which blunts that hit. Time your defense around it.
After the first Incindiate the 6-round Quicken can re-apply. Use the tempo to set up your kill.
